本人: the person himself, the said person
入院: する：to go into the hospital, to be hospitalised
今まで: till now, so far, up to the present
年寄り: old / aged person, the aged; older councilor
表す: [vt] express, manifest signs, symbols, signs; feelings
目指す: aim for, have an eye on
様子: situation, aspect, circumstances; appearance, looks; sign, indication
食べる: to eat, to live on (e.g. a salary), to live off
込む: [vi] put into; go into; be crowded
成る: become, form, consist of; be accomplished
付く: [vi] attach / adhere to ; be connected with
所為: cause, fault; because of a certain thing
売却: する：to sell, to sell of
不味い: bad-tasting, unpalatable; poor, clumsy; unwise, foolish
考える: to think (about, of), to think over, to ponder
引退: する：to retire (from work, an active life, etc.)
更新: する：to renew, to establish a new record, to update
受験: taking an examination (school and university entrance)
次第: order; circumstances, reasons; as soon as
別れる: to part (usu. of people), to part from, to part with
向上: する：to improve, to become better, to make progress
公表: する：to make public, to publicly announce
主張: する：to assert, to claim that, to insist (on [that])
計る: [vt] compute, calculate, estimate; guess, surmise, fathom
務める: [vi] perform one's duties; play one's part
答案: examination paper, examination script, answer sheet
施工: する：to construct, to carry out a construction project
信号: traffic light; traffic signal​; any signal
張る: spread out , extend over ; stretch, strain
休む: [vi] (take a rest, repose; suspend, discontinue; be absent; go to bed, retire
収まる: [vi] be put back in place, restored be settled, brought to a settlement
頂く: [vt] receive humbly, be given; eat, drink
換算: する：to convert (from one currency to another)
焼失: する：to be burnt down, to be consumed by fire
段取り: program, plan; step, course of action
同士: of the same kind, each other, fellow
移る: to move to, to change, to pass (vi.)
療養: する：to get medical treatment, to recuperate
造る: [vt] make, build what needs time and skill
整備: する：to service (an aeroplane [airplane]), to maintain (a car engine), to adjust (a machine)
整う: [vi] be in order, made up properly; adjusted regulated
修正: する：to amend, to revise, to modify, to correct, to retouch
割る: to divide, to split, to break
遊ぶ: [vi] play, amuse oneself; play around with, flirt; make an excursion, take a trip; visit
お酒: Alcholic bevarages, alcoholic drink, Japanese rice wine
処理: する：to deal with, to manage, to treat, to dispose of
絵本: an illustrated book, a picture book
取扱: handling, dealing, treatment; trading, selling; handling, manipulation, operation; service
末梢: tip, end; tip of a twig
上級: higher grade, advanced class, high class
並列: arranged in a row / column, parallel
横断: する：to cross, to go across
導入: する：to introduce (a new system, technology, etc.)
似る: to be alike, to resemble, to look like
節約: する：to economise, to save (money, time, water, electricity, etc.)
暮らす: [vi] live, lead one's life; make a living
枚数: number of sheets pages, plates, glass panes, …
巻き込む: [vt] roll up , wrap; involve, drag in
採る: [vt] adopt measure, proposal, attitute pick, catch fruit, insects, sample
留守: absence from home ; caretaking; defending as one's lord is away
疲れる: to get tired, to tire, to get fatigued
推進: する：to promote, to propel, to push forward
善し悪し: good or bad / evil, right or wrong
倍率: magnification power ; rate of competition in examinations
日韓: Japan and South Korea, Japanese-South Korean
破る: to break (a promise, rule, etc.), to tear (paper, clothing, etc.), to defeat
因る: to be caused by, to be due to ♢
挙げる: to raise (one's hand), to provide (examples), to enumerate (reasons), to arrest
林立: standing in close proximity (as of buildings)
筋道: reason, thread (of an argument), coherence; systematic method
創る: [vt] create, bring into being new things
家柄: social standing of a family; lineage
就く: to gain a position, to engage
箱根: Hakone (scenic mountain spot near Mt. Fuji)

勧誘: する：to invite, to persuade, to canvass
傷つく: to get hurt, to be hurt
雰囲気美人: woman who is not traditionally beautiful yet somehow very attractive, woman with an aura of beauty

昇進: する：to be promoted (in rank, at work, etc.)
惑わす: [vt] fascinate; mislead, lead astray, entice; bewilder, perplex, puzzle

上旬: first ten days of a month
中旬: middle ten days of a month
乱す: [vt] put into disorder, disturb, throw into confusion; dishevel
駆使: する：to have a good command of, to make full use of, to use freely

信託: trust, entrusting, leaving in someone's trust
矢印: arrow (symbol), (romantic) interest (for a certain person), direction (of one's attention, etc.)
崩す: to destroy, to level (a hill), to change [break] (a large bill), to write characters in a fluid [cursive] style
漏れる: to leak out, to escape, to come through, to be heard outside (a window, etc.)
却下: する：to reject, to dismiss, to overrule (an objection)
衝突: する：to collide, to conflict with
匹敵: する：to be a match for
拝見: する：to see, to have a look at (humble)
溶ける: to melt, to dissolve (as in salt in water) (vi.)

英語塾: private school for the study of English
ポン酢: <ponzu> (sauce made from soy sauce and citrus juice)
如何: how? would you like? how about?

伺い: question, inquiry; consulting the oracle; call, visit
叩頭: kowtow (kneel and bow until one's forehead touches the floor)
侵す: to invade, to violate, to infringe on (someone's rights)

穂先: spike [ear] of grain; spike of a spear; tip of a writing brush
穂状の: shaped like an ear of grain
山膚: mountain's surface, bare surface of a mountain

持ち駒: captured piece; means at one's disposal
覆う: to cover, to conceal, to hide
汰る: to shake, to jolt, to rock (cradle)

附属: する：to be attached to (as in a hospital attached to a university)

ワ冠: wa (ワ)-shaped grapheme atop certain kanji (such as 冠)

机上: top of the desk; academic, theoretical
玩ぶ: play with (as with one's pen, food, etc.)

挟撃: attack on both sides, pincer movement

お膳: low four-legged tray for serving food
遥かに: far, far off; a long time ago; by far
矛先: spearhead; the aim (of an attack); the brunt (of an argument)
裾野: skirts of a mountain, range (of volunteer activities, etc.)
尺八: end-blown bamboo flute (having a traditional standard length of 1.8 <shaku>)

籠もる: to shut oneself up, to be full of, to blur

霞む: [vi] haze, be hazy, mist; have dim sight

渇く: to be thirsty, to get dry
窮める: carry to extremity, reach an extreme
嗣ぐ: to succeed (a person, to a position, etc.), to inherit, to take over

奔走する: bustle about, exert oneself for, devote oneself to
その筈だ: That is to be expected, You would think so
